title: ExecutionReceipt
description: A receipt proving what happened at the boundary where an AI-controlled action could have become consequence.

timestamp.description: When the boundary verdict was produced.

attempted_action.description: The action or mutation that attempted to cross the boundary.

decision_id.description: The DecisionRecord identifier, or null if no valid record was present.

check_results.description: Named results for authority, scope, freshness, replay, signature, and receipt checks.

execution_occurred.description: Whether the attempted action became consequence.
